description: Financial impact assessment of outstanding campaign calendar and marketing content deliverables.

estimated_delay_in_weeks.source: CFO estimate based on project status

estimated_monthly_campaign_revenue.source: Hypothetical campaign revenue, requires CMO input for validation

estimated_monthly_campaign_variable_cost.source: Hypothetical campaign variable costs, requires CMO input for validation

estimated_monthly_fixed_costs_during_del.source: CFO estimate for ongoing operational costs during delay

top_risks.mitigation: CTO to complete campaign_calendar.json; CMO to develop marketing content.

top_risks.risk_name: Financial Risk: Lost Revenue & Increased Costs
top_risks.mitigation: Expedite campaign launch to minimize delay and associated financial impact.
CIO to investigate and resolve 'QA STATUS: PASSED' vs. 'outstanding deliverables' discrepancy.
